title: astragalus consanguineus
intro: Astragalus consanguineus, also known as the western milkvetch, is a perennial plant belonging to the legume family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immune-boosting effects. The health benefits of Astragalus consanguineus include reducing stress and fatigue, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. In traditional herbal medicine, Astragalus consanguineus is often prepared as a decoction, tincture, or dried powder, which can be consumed as a tea or added to soups and other dishes.
